home.source: MLB Stats API team game logs + stat splits

alerts.title: BOTH LINEUPS UNCONFIRMED
alerts.summary: Both batting orders remain projected or unavailable.

alerts.title: STL BACK-TO-BACK ARMS
alerts.summary: 3 relievers have worked on consecutive days.

alerts.title: CIN BACK-TO-BACK ARMS
alerts.summary: 3 relievers have worked on consecutive days.

alerts.title: WEATHER PENDING
alerts.summary: Game-time weather has not been imported.

positives.title: CIN STRONG SPLIT OFFENSE
positives.summary: The offense ranks 5th in OPS against the opposing starter's handedness.

negatives.title: STL LINEUP UNCONFIRMED
negatives.summary: The batting order remains projected or unavailable.

negatives.title: CIN LINEUP UNCONFIRMED
negatives.summary: The batting order remains projected or unavailable.

negatives.title: CIN STARTER STRUGGLING

negatives.title: CIN TRAFFIC CONCERN
negatives.summary: The starter has a 1.75 WHIP over the last 30 days.

negatives.title: CIN RECENT REGRESSION
negatives.summary: The starter's last-30 ERA is 2.53 runs above his season ERA.

negatives.title: CIN BULLPEN QUALITY

negatives.title: CIN BULLPEN TRAFFIC

intelligence_meta.fip: calculated from MLB component stats; constant configurable
intelligence_meta.xfip: calculated from air outs using configurable league HR/FB
intelligence_meta.wrc_plus: FanGraphs team leaderboard feed; exact active filters
intelligence_meta.rank_policy: best value receives rank 1; coverage stored per rank
